task: Search for the ovulation calculator and enter Mar 1 as the first date of the period and calculate the date of ovulation and pregnancy test day.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to WebMD’s Ovulation Calculator page, moved the calendar to March 2026, selected March 1 as the first day of the last period, and clicked Calculate. The resulting page explicitly showed: 'Approximate Ovulation March 15' and 'Pregnancy Test Day March 30' with 'Your Last period: 03/01/2026' and 'Your Cycle Length: 28 Days.' This satisfies the task of finding the calculator, entering Mar 1, and calculating the ovulation and pregnancy test day.
final_result_response:
Done. WebMD calculated:

- Approximate ovulation: March 15, 2026
- Pregnancy test day: March 30, 2026

This used WebMD’s default 28-day cycle and first period date of Mar 1, 2026.
action_history: Opening WebMD: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.webmd.com/');
Moving calendar to March: await page.locator('e29').click();
